programmes.show_description: Tense action thriller. A retired thief is persuaded to carry out one last diamond heist by her former partner, only to get mixed up in a murder and hunted by an assassin.
Action adventure with Ben Freeman. With his true love captured by the Sheriff of Nottingham, the legendary Robin Hood and his crew of outlaws execute a daring rescue to save her.
Horror Channel returns soon.

When a retired pest control worker sprays insect killer on a shared tree, his neighbours claim they suffered serious respiratory injury.
A writer claims she submitted articles that her editor never paid her for; he says the writing was not factual, and that he wasn't paid by his clients.
A woman demands thousands in payback for a valuable truck; her friend says she traded an antique, hand carved oak table for the vehicle.
A daycare provider says her attempt to improve a playground resulted in substandard concrete work; she sues for damages.
A senior citizen is accused of assaulting another senior at a Ladies' Auxiliary VFW meeting and is escorted out of her hotel room by police. She sues for damages.
After meeting a mechanic at a bowling alley, a woman ends up suing him for allegedly selling her broken-down BMW without her permission; he claims he was forced to get rid of it.
A mother's allegedly inappropriate behaviour with her daughter's fiancé, drinking problems and damage caused by Chihuahuas come into play in a fight over fishing poles.
After ruining her credit, a woman demands that her boyfriend's adult son return the car she co-signed for him or give her money to pay it off.
A woman claims her ex-boyfriend slashed her tyres but fails to prove a word of her story; he is still in the hot seat for alleged theft of her property.
Find out what's happening in London today with all the latest local news, opinions and events.
Lora Sinner wanted a new start and new friends, but newfound friendships turn to jealousy and they stage Lora's 'accidental' death during a camping trip.
When Landy Martinez is found dead in his home, an investigation reveals a toxic past relationship that wasn't ready to be over.
A retired UPS driver reveals new details about cult leader David Koresh and what led up to the deadly standoff with law enforcement nearly 25 years ago.
When a teacher disappears, his wife receives letters saying that he needed a clean break. Investigators suspect foul play, but without a body, the case would be difficult to prove.
A teenager is killed by her parents. They claim it was in self-defence, but forensic evidence indicates otherwise. Definite proof comes from an unlikely source.
Find out what's happening in London today with all the latest local news, opinions and events.
Chuck Norris is Walker in this modern martial arts western. In another Hayes Cooper adventure, Mormons and their wagon train must be defended from outlaws.
Action thriller with Gerard Butler. A submarine skipper sent to investigate the torpedoing of US and Russian vessels discovers the Russian president has been kidnapped by a rogue general.
Electrifying all-action sequel! ''Action Man' Jason Statham returns as Stelios to track down a Chinese mobster who has stolen his heart and replaced it with a battery-powered ticker.
Tense action. A single mother on holiday in Morocco is forced to take the law into her own hands after her child is abducted, but ends up being framed for murder.
Thriller with Western star James Coburn. A professor about to start a new job as a government adviser must eliminate all traces of his past as an industrial spy - with deadly consequences.

All hell breaks loose when a woman's handyman starts dating one of her tenants; she files a restraining order and sues him for alleged vandalism.
After a young man is rescued by a family friend, he makes a deal to move in and pay her back; she says he was like a son but sues him anyway.
An evening of tequila drinking evolves into a reckless car ride that ends with an alleged collision.
Squirrels in an attic, trash in the basement and tenant identity confusion come into play when a woman sues her landlord.
A woman who claims her ex-fiancé wasn't ready to get married sues him for alleged loans to buy a motorcycle, make a mortgage payment, and pay his tuition.
A man is accused of making homophobic comments and being rude to a fellow roommate; he sues his ex-roommate for the return of rent and a security deposit.
A $5,000 marijuana drug deal gone wrong is disputed by ex-roommates who fight over alleged damages as a result of a police raid.
After eight weeks of work, a young man says he was injured on the job and sues his boss for $5,000 for an alleged wrongful termination and a workman's comp claim.
After being incarcerated for a year, a man comes home to find that his car has vanished; he thinks it's been repossessed, but an ex-friend claims it is rightfully hers.
Find out what's happening in London today with all the latest local news, opinions and events.
Police lead a countrywide manhunt looking for a couple who have killed people at multiple pizza shops. A survivor gives his eyewitness account of the crime.
Soap star Gemma McCluskie's body was found in a suitcase floating in a river. Security footage would reveal who was carrying the suitcase she was found in.
Ambition, greed and gunshots at a Napa Valley winery - how did a bag with $800,000 in cash lead to murder in a vineyard?
In the deadliest train crash in US history, forty-seven were killed and many more injured. Clues to the cause lay etched in twisted steel and buried in the mud of the Bayou Canot.
A fire at Kings Cross Underground Station kills 31 people. Investigators pinpoint the cause of the fire, but it takes state-of-the-art technology to explain why it became deadly.
Find out what's happening in London today with all the latest local news, opinions and events.
Chuck Norris fights crime and helps the community as the eponymous Walker. Country music star Lila McCann guest stars as an aspiring singer.
Action adventure, directed by and starring Clint Eastwood. An ex-assassin is blackmailed into eliminating a target who is on a expedition, sending the hit-man on a perilous climb up the Eiger.
Crime starring Keanu Reeves. An undercover cop, disillusioned by the death of his wife, is questioned in the murder of an officer and must find evidence to clear his name.
